title: Allegro MicroSystems Q4 Earnings Beat
text: Allegro MicroSystems exceeded analyst expectations in its fourth quarter results. The semiconductor company reported earnings per share of $0.25, surpassing the Zacks consensus estimate of $0.21, representing a 19.05% surprise. Revenue reached $240.58 million for the quarter ending March 2024, slightly exceeding consensus by 2.38%. This essentially matched the prior year's $240.53 million in sales. The company has beaten revenue estimates in three of the last four quarters. Year-to-date, ALGM shares have declined approximately 3%, underperforming the S&P 500's 8.8% gain. The stock carries a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) rating. Analysts project upcoming quarter earnings of $0.18 per share on $216.6 million in revenues. Full-year fiscal projections stand at $0.94 earnings per share and $963.6 million in total revenues.
